problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: If Bacteriophage surface display for targeting is applied to types, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
